name: Walnut Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, icing sugar, and vanilla until light and smooth.
2. Gradually stir in the flour and chopped walnuts until a dough forms.
3. Transfer the dough to a 9-inch pan with a removable bottom.
4. Pat the dough evenly into the pan.
5. Using a fork, score the dough into 12 pie-shaped wedges.
6. Place one walnut piece on each wedge.
7. Cover the pan and place it on a cookie sheet.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 325°F (160°C) for 40 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
10. Cut into wedges.
Makes 12 servings. Store in a tightly covered tin container.
